The 0.965 directionality and repeated identical entries across the same markets confirm a mechanical strategy of sweeping cheap YES shares on doomed candidacies. Open positions follow the exact same template: LeBron James, Zohran Mamdani, Stephen A. Smith, Tim Walz — all at 0.007-0.011 YES.

domain_summary: This trader has no demonstrated genuine forecasting edge — performance is driven entirely by collecting sub-1-cent YES positions on candidates who never ran, winning when markets close and resolve NO (paradoxically recorded as wins in the data structure). Discount all signals from this account.
signal_weight_reasoning: The trader's strategy is purely mechanical yield-harvesting on near-zero probability YES positions. The 100% win rates and 0.965 directionality reflect market-closure resolution artifacts, not genuine forecasting. Entries at 0.006-0.011 provide no price discovery signal — they are noise positions chasing small absolute dollar returns across throwaway candidacies. No signal from this account should be used for STR-003.

summary: This trader's impressive ELO and perfect domain win rates are entirely artifactual — the strategy is to sweep sub-1-cent YES positions on implausible candidates and collect resolution payouts when markets close, generating wins with no genuine forecasting content. With only 6 distinct markets and near-identical entry prices across nearly all trades, this is a mechanical template rather than analytical trading. The sole exception is the Gavin Newsom NO at 0.64, which deserves isolated attention as a potentially genuine directional call. All other signals from this account should be excluded from STR-003 intelligence generation.
